citation.description: Harness reads the 161-row corpus, runs PRE vs POST kernels, writes runs/e5_nonregression_diff.json. Artifact is present at docs/experiments/plan-review-gate/runs/e5_nonregression_diff.json.

criteria.criterion: The replay runs the amended kernel over the full code_review_adjudication.jsonl corpus and commits a decision diff artifact.

citation.description: decision_diffs: 0, priority_diffs: 0, validity_diffs: 0, byte_identical: true, diffs: [] — the diff array is EMPTY over all 161 corpus rows.

criteria.criterion: The diff is EMPTY: byte-identical (decision, priority, validity) for every code-review finding; any non-empty diff fails the gate and is recorded as an R5 blocker.

citation.description: cohort_members: 0, asserted_capability_confirmed_na_for_all: true, non_na_rows: 0 — all 161 corpus findings are outside the cohort and carry na.

criteria.criterion: The new sub-answer is na for every finding outside the G6/E4/T3 cohort, asserted by the replay artifact.

citation.description: Section '## E5 — cross-gate non-regression replay' documents method (PRE/POST kernel design, deterministic replay), and outcome (table showing 0 diffs, byte_identical=true, na-for-all=true).

criteria.criterion: A docs/experiments/ writeup records method and outcome (the input to R5's gate row).
